mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (user_id, content, create_time, state,parent_id) VALUES (#{msg.userId}, #{msg.content}, #{msg.createTime}, #{msg.state},#{msg.parentId})
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.user_id as userId, m.content, m.create_time as createTime, m.parent_id as parentId, u.nickname, u.photo FROM message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE m.state = 1 ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
